_comment: AWS Security Group reference — create via console or CLI
_usage: aws ec2 create-security-group --group-name callanalyzer-sg --description 'CallAnalyzer web server' --vpc-id vpc-XXXXX
Description: CallAnalyzer - HTTPS web server with SSH access

IngressRules.Description: SSH — restrict to your IP for CLI access
IngressRules._note: Replace YOUR_IP with your office/home IP. For browser-based EC2 Instance Connect, also add the EC2_INSTANCE_CONNECT_IP range for your region (see: https://ip-ranges.amazonaws.com/ip-ranges.json, filter by service=EC2_INSTANCE_CONNECT). For us-east-1 this is 18.206.107.24/29.

IngressRules.Description: HTTP — for Caddy ACME challenge + redirect to HTTPS

EgressRules.Description: All outbound — needed for S3, Bedrock, AssemblyAI, npm, Let's Encrypt

_iam_role._comment: Attach an IAM instance profile with this policy so the app can use S3 + Bedrock without hardcoded keys

_iam_user_ssh_policy._comment: Add to IAM users/roles who need SSH access via EC2 Instance Connect
